title: astragalus psoraloides
intro: Astragalus psoraloides, also known as the huang qi or huang qi tai, is a type of plant in the legume family native to China. It is a perennial herb that has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Astragalus psoraloides include enhancing immune function, reducing fatigue, and improving cardiovascular health. Astragalus psoraloides can be prepared into various herbal products, such as capsules, teas, and tinctures, which are often used to promote overall well-being and prevent illness.
